overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a dystopian urban tent city beneath an overpass. The environment features makeshift shelters, abandoned vehicles, scattered debris, and neon-lit skyscrapers in the background. The player encounters NPCs and explores the detailed cyberpunk setting with dynamic lighting transitions between sunlit streets and shadowed underpasses.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned street with tent encampment and debris

events.description: approaching and entering the covered area beneath the overpass
moving from bright sunlight into the shadow of the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the tent city examining abandoned vehicles and makeshift shelters

entered.detail: rusted white delivery van with open doors surrounded by trash
large red camping tent set up on the sidewalk
red and white striped concrete road barriers blocking the street
large colorful umbrella over an abandoned food cart
burned out green sedan with smoke rising from the engine
massive concrete highway overpass with yellow and purple painted beams

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit dystopian street littered with abandoned vehicles and makeshift tent shelters. The player walks forward past concrete barriers and a red tent, approaching a large overpass structure. As the player moves deeper into the scene, they pass a smoking green car and enter the shadow of the overpass, with lighting shifting from bright natural sun to dappled shade.

events.description: slowing down as approaching a group of NPCs standing in the road ahead

agents.ego_description: walking under the dark overpass toward a group of three people standing in the roadway

notable_agents.action: group of three people standing together in the middle of the underpass, one appears to be taking photos

entered.detail: thick concrete pillars supporting the overpass overhead
fluorescent tube lights mounted on the underside of the overpass
tall skyscrapers with neon signage visible through the far end of the underpass

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper under the overpass, the environment becomes darker and more enclosed by concrete support columns. The player walks toward a group of three NPCs visible in the distance near the exit of the underpass. Overhead fluorescent lights illuminate the shadowed roadway as the player slows down approaching the group.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between underpass and open street

events.description: circling around the group of NPCs to observe them from different angles
exiting the dark underpass shadow back into bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: circling around three NPCs who are taking photos and interacting, examining them from multiple angles before moving past

notable_agents.action: woman in red jacket and thigh-high boots taking photos with a camera
man in orange jacket standing with hands in pockets observing the photographer

entered.detail: tall palm trees visible in the distance beyond the underpass exit
large amusement park ferris wheel structure in the background skyline

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the shadowed underpass into a mixed lighting zone, circling around three NPCs engaged in a photo shoot. A woman in red takes pictures while two men pose and observe. The camera moves around them in a semi-circle, revealing palm trees and a distant ferris wheel in the background, before the player continues past the group back into the open street.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along tent encampment with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: moving from the asphalt road onto the concrete sidewalk beside the buildings
turning right toward a building entrance with a food vendor setup

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past tents and debris, heading toward a building entrance with a food cart

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking along the sidewalk in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wide concrete pavement with scattered cardboard and debris
bright orange metal railing along the edge of the sidewalk
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
cluster of camping tents and blue tarps set up against the building wall

segments.scene_description: Leaving the underpass behind, the player walks along a sunlit concrete sidewalk lined with orange railings and graffiti-covered walls. The path runs alongside more tent encampments and scattered debris. The player passes a pedestrian walking the opposite direction and continues toward a building entrance where a food vendor cart is set up under an overhang.

scene_state.functional_zone: food vendor area under building arcade

events.description: slowing down and approaching the food vendor cart

agents.ego_description: approaching a red food cart where two vendors are preparing food on a large grill

notable_agents.action: vendor wearing a mask tending to food cooking on the grill cart

entered.detail: concrete building overhang providing shade over the vendor area
large red mobile food cart with a grill and preparation surface
white plastic patio chairs arranged near the food cart
thick concrete support columns for the building structure

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a food vendor setup tucked under a building overhang. A large red food cart with an active grill is attended by a vendor, with plastic chairs arranged nearby. The area is shaded by the building structure, creating a cooler, sheltered spot compared to the sunlit sidewalk. The player slows down as they reach the cart, ending the exploration of this urban encampment area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sunlit dystopian street through a shadowed overpass and back into the open urban sprawl. It begins by moving past abandoned vehicles and red tents in bright daylight, gradually transitioning into the dappled shade and concrete enclosure of a massive overpass. As the camera pushes deeper under the structure, the lighting shifts to artificial fluorescent glows before emerging into a mixed-light zone to circle a group of NPCs conducting a photo shoot against a backdrop of palm trees and a distant ferris wheel. The scene then opens back onto a sunlit sidewalk lined with orange railings and graffiti, passing further encampments and a lone pedestrian. Finally, the movement leads toward a building overhang, where the bright street gives way to a sheltered area featuring a red food vendor cart and a smoking grill.
